title: Notify if active time tracker after X hours
excerpt:
We sometimes forget about an active time tracker, so it would be nice to have an automation that could send a notification after X hours, like “Just a reminder, you have an active time tracker on [pulse]”. 
Alternatively…

posts.author: Danish (Klaus)
posts.cookedHtml:
We sometimes forget about an active time tracker, so it would be nice to have an automation that could send a notification after X hours, like “Just a reminder, you have an active time tracker on [pulse]”.

Alternatively, an icon somewhere in the monday.com view, like a red “recording” circle, to notify user that it’s tracking time.
